username_0: This is a simple change that adds the `getAllFields` method to the `Planner`
and `SQLPlanner` classes. `getAllFields` returns the set of all fields
identified by all of the user's joins (including any implicit joins) and the
equi filters of the SQL.

username_0: We use the following in our `config.toml`
```
[img]
srcset = "./img/logo.png"
default = "./img/logo.png"
sizes = [64, 128, 256]
```

The issue is that for the preview image, we only want to link to the 64 and 128 size images but that's not working as the 64 and 128 size images are combined together and then being resized using the max dimension of them both.

How can I modify this to make the image preview be linked to the different image sizes?
<issue_comment>username_1: See https://www.netlifycms.org/docs/image-sizes/#using-custom-dimensions for a way to do this.

<filename>_posts/2017-09-12-microservices.md
---
layout: post
title: Microservices
category: blog
---

# Intro

## What are microservices?
Microservices are services in our app written to fulfill the same business goal
each one in turn is independent of the other. 

## Why do we need Microservices?

1. We have a large monolithic application with lots of tightly coupled components, our customers hate this.
2. If each service is independent of another, we can scale each service independently.

## When do we use microservices?
When we have lots of independent services with lots of moving parts, in a cloud environment, this can all be done at one time, or at different times, but in such a way that the whole thing becomes more reliable, and better able to handle business demands.

## What is different when writing a service?

* Service should be self contained: 100% DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself)
* No shared data, this is a pattern that leads to errors and coupling.

username_0: - [x] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/ionic-team/ionic-native/issues) and confirm that this is not a duplicate

**Describe the Feature Request**

We plan to continue using the same naming style across Ionic packages as we did initially, when we decided to use `@ion-native` format for TypeScript declarations. Currently there are just two packages that do not use this style: `cordova-plugin-device` and `cordova-plugin-screen-orientation`. Those would be changed to `@ionic-native` format.

<issue_start><issue_comment>Title: FeignClient not handling null parameters
username_0: I have a REST service that has the following input format. (Note that the type is different from the actual response type)

    {
      "id" : "Id here..."
    }

In this case Feign has generated a method with the wrong input type:

    public <T> T getSingleResourceById(String id, String token, ParameterizedTypeReference<T> typeReference) throws MalformedURLException, IOException, RequestFailedException;

The input signature is correct because of:

    <T> T getSingleResourceById(String id, String token, ParameterizedTypeReference<T> typeReference) 

and 

     ParameterizedTypeReference<T> typeReference


The default response type for this service (i.e. when the id parameter is absent) is a `Map<String, String>` - so Feign correctly generates the following signature:

    public <T> T getSingleResourceById(String id, String token) throws

Ploidy

Etymology
- A name honoring John E. Wigren (1899-1993) of the University of Arizona, who made the first isolation of a mammalian homologue of CYCA2; the 2 is a marker protein (WIG2/p57).
- The abbreviation CYC2 comes from Cyclops. The genus Cyclops has only one known species, the crab. The crab has 2 eyes (right and left). CYC2 thus represents the number of eyes the crab has.. It is an eye marker protein that is expressed in the retinal cells of developing eyes. The protein is first expressed in the eye-specific expression domain, i.e. the eye field. It gives a homozygote defect, i.e. one which is not expressed in the two homologous pairs of C4-C4 cells. 2 mutations; this has since been shown to be incorrect, with 17 mutations having been found. username_0: The following code will compile and run fine, but when using the `range` function on the array, using a different index fails with an error. This is true for both `reduce` and `reduceRight` and works just fine for numbers outside the array length.

```javascript
const arr = [1, 2, 3, 4];
const sum = arr.reduce((a, b, i) => { a = i === 3 ? a + b : a }, 0);
console.log(sum);
let i = 4;
console.assert(i === 3, 'failed');
const s = arr.reduceRight((a, b, i) => { a = i === 3 ? a + b : a }, 0);
console.log(s);
```

### Details

* CodeceptJS version: 1.
* NodeJS Version: 8
* Operating System: macOS
* Web Browser and its version: none

I had a funny experience a couple of weeks ago.
I was sitting in my office, doing my thing. One of the folks I work with, an executive, went out of her way to praise my work.
I was flattered, of course. I love getting positive feedback.
Soon after, the exec made two important comments about her work in my office. They said, specifically, "That's one of the reasons I chose you."
I was flattered and pleased.
I had a funny thought.
I thought: I'm not the one with the skills. I'm not the one with the vision.
I am a lucky, happy idiot.
I said it out loud. The thought did not make me feel comfortable.
Soon, I thought: What if I was not the smartest person in the room?
I laughed.
A few more days passed by and I was driving through the mountains and I said: What if everyone in the room is smarter?
But I do not feel smarter today.
It is fun to think I am dumb. I like to think of myself as a dork and a dumb ass

If you want to use this on the command-line, you can use a wildcard (`**`) to expand the directory: 

For example, using PowerShell and `-r, --recursive` to recursively read and parse directories to output to stdout:

```powershell
cd /path/to/root-directory
# read all directory content from current directory (and subdirectories)

Based on my own experience with WordPress in the past, when creating a site with multiple sub-sites, you’ll need to follow a few steps:

The European Parliament has taken another shot at introducing a new tax on the Internet that will require technology firms such as Google to pay a levy if they operate in the EU. This time around, the plan has won the backing of a group of MEPs but it isn't clear what the next steps will be or whether or not European officials will finally start implementing what has been a long-running idea.
In the summer of 2013, the European Commission, the European Parliament, and the Council of Ministers agreed to start working on new legislation to tax the Internet in Europe. They came up with a proposal that would levy a tax, which they called the "Adaptation Levy," on large companies that handle large amounts of personal data and are responsible for the majority of spam and malware.
It was a noble idea and the tax would have collected around $500 million per year but after a number of failed attempts to get a vote through the European Parliament, a large section of the EU Parliament decided that it needed more time for debate.

When I was first introduced to Business intelligence tools (or BI as I shall refer to them from this point on), I was told that its primary benefit was in providing a visual representation of key performance metrics such as sales and inventory for a particular set of products.

I was also told that these dashboards would be useful with management teams to give managers a view of what is going on in their specific area and as such dashboards were the key tool in ensuring that managers were able to take the appropriate actions.

Almost immediately after being told this, the idea of dashboards completely left my mind.

It seemed pointlessly pointless.

The Gift of Gratitude: Practicing Thankfulness for Four Weeks
As the days shorten and the temperatures drop, I’ve noticed my family getting into the spirit of the season. We’ve started our Advent countdown, decorated the tree, and pulled out the holiday decorations. I can’t remember the last time we did all this this early, but it’s making me happy.
With holiday preparations comes a change in our lives that I would never wish for anyone but it is definitely fun to see our house decked out for the holidays. As we move into this wonderful season, I have this overwhelming instinct to be joyful, to be with family and friends, and to share the true essence of the holidays.
I don’t want to let the commercialism of the holidays ruin what is a very important time of year. I want to let each of the 31 days before Christmas (I was a geek in school and have a countdown calendar) be a time of gratitude. I want to count my blessings rather than my woes. First it is something you carry out to the place where the telescope you would be using would be placed. Now comes the telescope. A big window on top of the place of use is the telescope. The aperture is the size of the window. The more the aperture means the more details it can catch. The more details means a more beautiful view and the more expensive it becomes. Now comes the lens and the tube. The lens is the thing which would be used for viewing the stars or would be used for observing something in the depth. The tube on the other hand would hold the focusing lens. Now the tube can have either achromatic or achromatic. The difference lies in the fact that one would use the tube for the telescope that has been made for the specific purpose. Now comes the eyepiece. The eyepiece is the thing which would be used to watch the image of the thing that is to be observed. # PurePythonGem

[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/purepythongem.svg)](http://badge.fury.io/py/purepythongem)

The PurePythonGem gem is a simple gem for Pure Python scripts written in the .pyx-extension, which allows compiling of Python files into a Ruby version 2.2 or newer.

Usage:

	require 'purepythongem'

	GemBuilder.new("./code_here.pyx")
		.name("example")
		.version("0.1b0")
		.requires(["simple.rb", "more_simple.rb"])
		.build_using_ruby("simple.rb", "more_simple.rb")
		.save_into("./example.gem")

username_0: … are encoded.

This is an implementation of #2787.

It will allow the use of new encoding strategies:
  - `0 = unknown` (existing code with no change)
  - `1 = SQS` (requires adding the `PARAM_ENCODING_FOR_FREE_SPACE` and `PARAM_USE_SQS_FOR_FREE_SPACE` to every object)
  - `2` = `SQS_WITH_BACKOFF_JITTER` (requires adding the `PARAM_ENCODING_FOR_FREE_SPACE` and `PARAM_ENCODING_FOR_BACKOFF_JITTER` to every object)

<issue_start><issue_comment>Title: Add new `add-tag-to-file` command to change the tag name of a tagged-for-release-file.
username_0: In `release-workflow.sh`, after the version, release, or prerelease label is applied to `CHANGELOG.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md` needs to be changed (to use its own version number) to make the release PR ready for review.  But we can't just change the release tag value (which is the version) because that would make the wrong version the next commit.  We need to create a new tag with its own version number.  We should have a command that makes a tag and changes its `name` option to the name of the new tag.

For example, from master:

```bash
# Set tag-for-release-PR on the master branch
$ git checkout master
$ git tag-for-release-PR

# Create a new tag of the master branch, name it `add-release-PR-test`, with
# the version value:

## Impact

Should not impact existing consumers.

The National Rental Affordability Scheme (NRAS), also called First Home Affordability
Scheme, was a policy initiative of the Australian Labor Government to reduce
Australia's rental vacancy rates and increase investor rental incomes. For the
purchase of an occupied NRAS rental property, the purchaser would be able to
write off an interest-free loan of up to 40% of their annual gross income for a
specific investment period of 3 or 5 years. The scheme was designed to encourage
home ownership, not rental, and to discourage speculation by private
investors.

The NRAS program commenced in March 2008. The government aimed to expand the
program by increasing the number of available rental properties to 140,000 by April
2010.  After that the program would be scaled back as the scheme was replaced
by the First-Half Settlement Deduction, an alternative, less generous scheme.

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class PostResource extends JsonResource
{
    /**
     * Transform the resource into an array.
     *
     * @param  \Illuminate\Http\Request  $request
     * @return array
     */
    public function toArray($request)
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'post_title' => $this->post_title,
            'post_cat' => $this->category->name,
            'post_cat_id' => $this->category->id,
            'post_publish' => $this->publishedOn,
            'description' => $this->description,
            'image' => url("storage/{$this->featured_image}")
        ];
    }
}

Dry ice is commonly used as a frozen food packaging material. It is used as a method for preserving perishable foods by preventing oxygen from reaching the food product. Dry ice sublimates quickly once in contact with oxygen. Therefore, by placing a pound of dry ice into a container, the container will be full of carbon dioxide gas. The food will remain frozen in this pressurized container, and the carbon dioxide will provide a preservative to prevent the food from going bad.
Dry ice provides numerous environmental advantages over its alternatives. It does not produce any methane or carbon monoxide. It also does not produce any emissions. Also, it does not generate heat during its sublimation process, so it does not generate any additional greenhouse gas..

A new report issued by the University of Florida's Department of Entomology and Nematology says the state’s citrus industry was affected by the hurricanes last fall because of a reduction in bees.
That report, called the 2017 Citrus Production Report, was updated with information from 2016 and covers the effects of Hurricanes Irma and Maria in September.
It found a decrease in the bee population, which pollinates citrus and is estimated to lose one third of its work force.
“House hold pets are also very important for pollination, and unfortunately, for the winter honey bees, they tend to be out-competed by the pet populations,” said Sheryl Kicklighter, a UF/IFAS Extension faculty member who has been collecting pollinator data on the Treasure Coast.
The report found Florida's orange yield was down 16% to 20% compared to a normal year.
“I know at UF/IFAS, we are working with growers and trying to understand the impacts because bees are critical for good quality citrus,”

import { getCurrentFrame } from "@lib/getters/getCurrentFrame";
import { isFrameAvailable } from "@lib/isFrameAvailable";

export const updateScene = ({ camera, scene }) => {
  if (isFrameAvailable()) {
    const currentFrame = getCurrentFrame();
    camera.attachControl(true, renderer.domElement);
    const viewMatrix = camera.getViewMatrix();
    const projectionMatrix = camera.getProjectionMatrix();

    scene.updateMatrixWorld(true);
    scene.matrixWorld.premultiply(viewMatrix);
    scene.matrixWorld.premultiply(projectionMatrix.inverse);
  };
};

 * A {@link ByteStream} with a fixed buffer and a length.
 * The {@link ByteStream} only accepts data if it is larger than the buffer.
 * 
 * @author <NAME>
 *
 */
public class FixedByteStream extends AbstractByteStream {

    private int length;
    private int fixedLength;
    private int bufferSize;

    public FixedByteStream(int bufferSize, int length, int fixedLength) {
		this.bufferSize = bufferSize;
        this.length = length;
        this.fixedLength = fixedLength;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean hasNextData() {
		if (position == maxBufferPos) {
            return true;
		} else if (maxBufferPos < length) {
            return true;
		} else {
			return false;
		}
    }

class RemoveDuplicatesFromSortedList:
    def removeDuplicates(self, head):
        if head is None or head.next is None:
            return head

        q0, q1 = head, head

        while q0.next is not None:
            if q0.val != q1.val:
                q0.next = q0.next.next
                q0 = q0.next
            else:
                q1 = q1.next

        return head.next


t = RemoveDuplicatesFromSortedList()
head = [5, 1, 2, 3, 5]
tail = [2, 3, 4]
print(t.removeDuplicates(head), head)
if head is not None:
    print(head)
print(t.removeDuplicates(tail), tail)

<issue_start><issue_comment>Title: Is the problem with GLTFLoader still there?
username_0: I'm using webVR in a webgl-based renderer that is based on BabylonJS. I'm experiencing the issue with gltf-loader, that is I can see my 3D-model in my renderer, but in a WebVR browser. But if I replace the model with an image (which is in a subfolder), nothing changes. I was wondering if it's still the same here. This is what I'm experiencing:

https://jsfiddle.net/uabp59k0/4/
<issue_comment>username_1: The problem with the gltf-loader still exists.
<issue_comment>username_2: @username_1 
The `glb` extension for GLTF 1.0 is a binary format that does not natively support WebAssembly. Babylon does not support it natively (because of the binary format).

I think it is still on the TODO for 2.0.<issue_closed>

# v-for-in

> for in v-for helper


## Install
```sh
$ npm install --save v-for-in
```


## Usage
```js
import vforin from 'v-for-in'

vforin(VArray, (key, value) => {
    // ...
})
```


## API

### vforin(vforKeyName(thisArg), handler)


### vforin.helper

```js
var vForIn = require('v-for-in');

vForIn.helper();
/*
vfor_in
v-for-in
*/
```

Third place on the day went to Peder Bäckman and Lars Andersson driving a Peugeot 10

5. Use washi tape to create personalized labels for gifts. Stick one on a mason jar filled with homemade candies. (via Tatertots and Jello)

Situation

public abstract class AbstractResponse {

    @Getter

    private final String body;

    protected AbstractResponse(Map<String, String> headers, String body) {
        this.headers = headers;
        this.body = body;

        return body == null ? ContextUtils.EMPTY_TEXT : body;
    }

        headers.put(header, value);

La gène TBK1 détermine la sensibilité à la laminexie et aux phénothérapies par l'ATF4 et la Rac

Le gène TBK1 détermine la sensibilité aux vaccins 

TBK1 agit en tant que signal intermédiaire, permettant l'intermédiation entre des signalons extracellulaires antigènes et leur réponse immunitaire. Cependant, le gène TBK1 est aussi impliqué dans l'inhibition de la résistance à différents agents pathogènes, et au fait que TBK1 soit impliqué dans cette fonction, il serait impliqué dans le développement des vaccins, les anticorps et la mise en route (MTI, l'injection d'eau, la pénétration dans la peau). Il aide les macrophages à attaquer correctement les bactéries, les parasites et les virus. 

De même que le gène ATF4, le TBK1 a un rôle essentiel dans le développement lamineux

Horses.
Daily, weekly, or monthly use of your pastures is a big part of their care. Your horses need a place to stay that has grass.
Most horses like to graze as much as possible. Providing a large area of pasture is good for their health and their temperament. It seems that horses are happier if they can graze their entire life.
Our horses are out in our fields and woods for 24 hours of the day.
They run over the ground until the morning sun hits their back, then they go back to grazing. When we turn our horses out to pasture for the night, we don't ever close them into stables.
They will live out in their pastures or in fields if they need to graze for the winter. Our pastures get so tall at times that the snow doesn't reach the grass.
In the winter months, we'll often let the horses stay in their outdoor stalls as long as it's not snowing or sleeting.

Sven Kramer won his third gold medal in four days to close out his 2013 season. Kramer won the 5000m event today at the track and field championships in Moscow. Kramer finished in 13:27.52, ahead of Denis Nikolayev who finished second in 13:28.39. This was not Kramer’s first time racing in this event, he was the last year to race at this event in 2012. At the time, Kramer held the world record, which he did not break since the gold medal was to be for the most world records. That honor ultimately went to Michael Stöckert of Germany.
Stöckert finished second in this event also to add to his gold medal total. Stöckert set his own world record in this event on Sunday, finishing in 13:20.45. It looked like Stöckert had a lot of ground to make up to catch Kramer on this day, but this would not be the case.
Aleksei Poltoranin of Russia finished third behind Stöckert

A couple of days ago, a friend of mine sent me an invite to become part of a new network on Facebook called The Blogger's Lounge. I'd love to tell you why this social network is so special. It isn't.
My problem with The Blogger's Lounge is that it is a social network for bloggers, which means that it is a social network for people who already know what a social network is. People who join the Blogger's Lounge probably already know where to find friends, chat, and socialize. But people like me, who don't even know what a blog is, would never join.
My main problem with The Blogger's Lounge is that it is a social network for people who are already friends -- online and offline. It doesn't encourage the formation of new relationships.
My definition of a social network is this -- a place to gather friends, communicate, and socialize. A blog is just the medium, it is like the phone or the email. Bloggers use their blogs to communicate -- not to socialize. Communicating in a public, virtual space doesn't make it social.

<issue_start><issue_comment>Title: Remove usage of deprecated String objects
username_0: String objects as used via the `toString()` construct in class definitions were replaced by String.fromCharCode().

However since the String objects are still used to create JS-Strings, we need to check the `toString()` signature as well for deprecated methods since they might still be used without replacement by other code.

I think this is the best way to prevent future issues. We could also try other solutions such as an exception when `toString()` is used on String objects but I think it might not be worth it due to future issues such as https://github.com/Microsoft/TypeScript/issues/29113 I have mentioned.

username_0: In the cpp_example example we were finding the `cxx14_stdlib` dependency of
`foo::bar` by using pkg-config in the `cpp_example` library. This was found
by trying to find this dependency in the build directory in the host machine,

(<destdir>/lib/pkgconfig) works.

username_0: **Description**
As developers working on user interface for various frontend services we are facing the same challenge of dropdown list.


So what is the best way to provide such experience, how we can provide to the users, a rich dropdown experience ? 

So we propose to add "dropdown list component" using 'carbon-react-dropdowns', which can be integrated with other "react components" in carbon.


We also thought of other options like 'Select', 'Taglist' and 'Radio group' components but in each we have to deal with the state of a specific component that is associated with the same dropdown.

So what would be our prefer option ? 



**Describe the solution you'd like**
Just implement another 'dropdown' component from react dropdownlist library .

# Installation and Setup

To use the SDK with any of our services, you must first register an app with Amazon
[AWS](https://aws.amazon.com/) or with Google.

## AWS

1. Open the [Amazon Developer](https://developer.amazon.com/) console
2. Click on the "Apps" button on the left side. You should see "My Apps" in a drop-down list. 
   Clicking on this brings you to a page of available Apps that you can use with Amazon or
   AWS.
3. Click on the "Create an App" button at the top-right of the screen. Choose one of the
   app types and complete the registration process.
4. Once your app is registered, you will need:
   - The Application ID (client ID)
   - A redirect URI

## Google

The companies were unable to obtain necessary regulatory approval from the Justice Department because of antitrust concerns. “Sysco and PFG terminated the merger agreement because a federal court has ruled that the merger would be anticompetitive and that PFG is unwilling to divest assets to address this ruling,” according to the filing.
“We will be reevaluating our strategic growth opportunities in light of the challenges and opportunities presented by this decision,” CEO Brian Niccol said in a statement released after Sysco. “We will continue to focus on delivering value to our shareholders, customers and associates as we navigate through this challenging period.”

text:
Quartz is one of the most common and varied minerals. It is made up of silicon dioxide (SiO2), combined with elements such as aluminum, iron, titanium, magnesium and other trace elements. Quartz is found under the Earth's surface in many forms. It's crystal structure allows some to grow large. Quartz's hardness is 7 which makes it the hardest silica-based mineral.
Quartz is colorless, clear, milky, pink, yellow and other colors depending on the trace elements present in the mineral. It can also form in a banded pattern.
As the crystal structure of quartz is based on silicon dioxide, quartz is also sometimes referred to as silicon dioxide.
Its composition is a combination of the element silicon (Si) and the element oxygen (O), making it an ideal mineral to make silicon chips and solar cell materials.
Silica is the most prevalent component in all living tissues in the world, including the human brain. Quartz is 15% silicon dioxide.

If the vote is a success the county would then hold a vote in 4-6 weeks with a potential vote for county staff to recommend to the Planning Commission in May.

The proposed rezoning area would include the former Sears Roebuck building and the parking lot adjacent to it, south of Old Glebe Road, between Norkirk Drive and Old Dominion Drive.
The county currently has two major rezoning requests under review in 2013, both in Oak Hill and Merrifield.

text:
My stepson decided he wanted a Pokemon birthday cake. This being him, I didn’t have much time or skill left to spare lol. So he and I went to walmart and I got a cake mix, he bought frosting. I googled and found instructions on how to make a cake from a box. I used an 8×11 and divided the batter up equally so I had batter for 3 6 inch layers. I found that more often than not, I wanted my characters to fight with words and that the “fighting” itself, the scenes that are a bit messy were the best. In many ways I think the characters in the later novels have more in common with the earlier works, the world less, and the emotions and actions a lot more complex and interesting.
I also have this impression, that the earlier books may, in fact, “say more.” And I do mean, I think they say just as much, if not more, in the pages where, say, “Ole Man Logwood is a thief,” – than in the later parts of the series where the action is thick on the ground.
And there, let’s be honest, isn’t exactly the same thing.
I still love those, too.
But they, at their heart, don’t seem so deeply, profoundly different as the more later books, which at their heart feel more like a kind of “classical” story. It’s more like a tale – than an experiment.

The Western Shoshone call themselves Newe, and the Eastern Shoshone call themselves Nimiipuu. Shoshone groups are now spread throughout Wyoming, Idaho, Oregon, Nevada, and northern Utah in the States of Oregon, Idaho, and Wyoming.
While no one really knows how these people came to be in the American West, they may have been migrants from other sections of what is today southern California. They were driven out there by the Paiute Indians of southern Utah.
The Shoshone and related Paiute Indians have been called the "true Indians of the West," for it was the Southern Utah and Southern Nevada Shoshone who were the original inhabitants of the entire American West from Mexico to the British Northwest, including the Shoshone lands of Idaho, eastern Oregon, and Wyoming.
The Shoshone are related to the Hualapai, Havasupai, and Paiute, and to the Hopi Indians of Arizona. The Shoshone call themselves Newe , and the Paiute call themselves Snake Indian.

Your brain is telling you to hunt down the next meal, even though you don't have one, and so it causes you to crave the next meal, even though you don't have it. It keeps your brain functioning with the same high level of activity that a hunter-gatherer had on a day to day basis. Your mind is not operating in a way that will make it easier for you.

SRID is a tedious and time consuming exercise. Not all the data is available in the format of shapefiles, some have coordinate systems and do not have the correct coordinate reference to use for the geographic search engine to recognize it as a valid coordinate system. The second issue to be resolved is to transform the coordinates of a given shapefile to an SRID known to the geographic search engine.


![_config.yml]({{ site.baseurl }}/images/transform_map.png){: .align-center}
_The same dataset from `wri/world-borders/world-borders-latest.zip`, unzipped, but re-pointing the coordinates to a known SRID (EPSG:3857)_

The geospatial search interface does not transform the coordinates itself. When the user points their browser to the geospatial search and enters some coordinates, they will be passed to the geospatial search engine where they must be transformed to an SRID for the search engine to identify the correct spatial reference. This is where this application comes in. Geospatial search interface can use the application to fetch any dataset that has a GIS feature like a point,

text:
We all know that labeling is deceptive, but we also know that in a large data set with many different labels, it is sometimes the best way to find patterns. In this section, you'll learn a few tips for dealing with labels and how to avoid unintentionally biasing your results.

Labels can only be an imperfect indicator of underlying data. Labels aren't guaranteed to be perfect, and they aren't necessarily all from the same type of events. This means even if your data only has one type of label, your results may contain instances that aren't as related as you anticipated and that can influence your conclusions.

To avoid this, always remember to evaluate your results through all possible contexts. Always think of the "other" that is in the data that isn't labeled. If you use a labeling scheme that is not very good, you may not find as many interesting things in the data as you had wanted to.

In addition, if you are trying to make predictions or find patterns in your data, be careful with using labels. If you are simply predicting some number or categorical type of data, it can be as simple as using a regression algorithm

I was surprised when the first batch of about nine came in around 1 p.m., two or three minutes before the raindrops began to fall. They seemed to know the time and I’ll bet they had to hurry to get here to be ready to weather the storm.

A cloud solution should look similar to how you’d expect to set up your cloud solution, and this is one area that will need extra care. Here you want to ensure you have a single login for each app and service you use. This will also help reduce passwords, and make it easier for users to use your solution.
# 3. Access to the Solution is Ready for Anybody
The last area (and one of the most important) when evaluating a cloud solution is, of course, security. Access to your solution should be ready to be used by anyone that has been granted access. There are a number of ways in which you can achieve this, the solution must:
- Be easy to access

There are a few options to avoid this issue.
- cp -Rp Source directory to destination directory
- cp -r -p, with the same output of cp -Rp.
- cp -Rp Target file to the same location of Source file.
These would help avoid copying the target that may be deleted.
Other Alternative to cp Command Copying files
There are other ways to copy the files and set permissions using the cp command.

GPS – Global Positioning System: a system for determining the geographic location and navigation of all devices on the Internet of Things.
GPRS – General Packet Radio Service: high-speed packet radio system that’s used to transfer data over the air on a mobile phone.
GLONASS – Global Navigation Satellite System: a Russian satellite navigation system.
G-Force: a force that creates acceleration, it can be either upward or downward.
G-Sensor: a gyroscope that measures directional acceleration.

It is the exclusive right to control production (making copies, translating, etc.), display (put in a book or on the Internet), copy (using a website, or copying for your book or painting) for others to enjoy and profit from.
The term used to describe your exclusive right to control how someone else can use or display your artwork is “Copyright.” For authors, your copyright arises at publication, for others it is the moment you create the work. Since it has an active verb (is), it’s possible that the sentence is being used in a passive voice where the listener (the reader) will assume that something is going to be done to the car. To clarify, the active form of a sentence is where the subject does something (verb + subject = verb + object), while the passive form of a sentence is when the agent of a command is not identified.
In the active voice, the subject comes first – He, I, we, you. In the passive voice, the object comes first – The car, They, It. Here’s a simple but effective tool you can use to help you see at a glance whether you’re using the active or passive voice.

text:
Why Many Businesses Choose to Incorporate?
Many people have the understanding that the corporate world is full of a lot of money and prestige, but not everyone sees how beneficial this choice is. There are many benefits to starting your own business, but one of the major factors in starting a company is that taxes are handled very differently for corporations compared to personal taxes. A corporation keeps all of its profits for only an amount that is used for other business expenses and the dividends that they pay out to their shareholders. A business owner is able to defer any income taxes due by simply paying them out in the form of dividends.
When a business owner owns profits in a corporation, they will owe tax on that income when they sell the stock of the company. If the stock is held for more than one year, they will owe no capital gains tax, but the individual will pay the long-term capital gains tax at an applicable rate. This can be a huge tax break. By owning corporate stock, the income that the company earns can be deferred. This will allow for the business owner to be able to pay lower taxes at

text:
Bitcoin is a currency, used to exchange goods and services, without the use of a central authority or bank. It is a decentralized technology and has no central owner or issuer. Transactions are secured by cryptography – a process of verifying information securely, and it is not possible for third parties to perform fraudulent actions, due to its public, digital nature.
Blockchain: a shared public ledger used to record Bitcoin transactions. As all the transactions are recorded on blockchain network it is impossible in turn for a single transaction to alter the other, or the transaction records at other sites. This system enables the possibility of instant trustless exchange of value. Transactions with Bitcoin are also permanent, unlike credit card transactions.
Hashing: the process of making a hash or “digital fingerprint” of a file, to verify it. When you want to verify a document or a file, you will need to hash it beforehand. A hash is a unique combination of mathematical functions that produces a fixed-length string. A hash of some number “a” will always produce the same fixed-length string, regardless of the number you use to hash it, and regardless of how you use that number

Assume a r-dimensional hyperplane P is generated by vectors u1 and u2. Then P is defined by two scalar product of u1 and u2, with a 2-coefficients form.
So if u1 and u2 are two vectors on the hyperplane P we do the following computation:
(1) P1= V1 . u1 u1' u2 'u2 V2. 2u1 u1' u1 u1' u2'u2
(2) P2= V2 . u2 u1' u2' u1 u1' u2 u1' u2' u2
and we define P=P1-P2.
But this does not work if all the vectors v1 and v2 are not on the same component (e.g. V1 consists only of the components of v1, V2 consists only of the components of v2).
How do we handle this situation

La cimeta-muralda hakatahua'é é o nome que se dá àquela parte das formas de plato que são cobernadas com a cebola ou outros especiemais do típico sashimi, sendo eles carne no geral e frutos do mar. Sendo assim, são alimentos do tipo tokoyaki. Sabe-se, contudo, que os índios de Hakata já utilizavam o tocakimé ao redor do século VI, onde este termo significa frutas do mar.

O tokayaki, além de ser uma das formas de preparar a carne com sashimi, pode ser também preparado com vegetais, que se enchem com sabor e que fazem o sabor de maior intensidade, tendo símbolicamente representado muitas vezes a vitória do héroe de uma vitoriosa batalha.

Cannacord B202 Investar Am Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides investment management, and other financial services for individual and corporate investors. The Insurance segment offers life insurance and annuity products for policyholders. Its Securities Trading segment buys and sells a variety of listed and unlisted securities, as well as derivatives, to fund its investments. 	        if(x!=null)Some(x)elseNone())
	 */

A friend who'd just started out running wrote after sharing he/wanted to run from work to home: "So, would I get free lunch?"
I told him he'd eat the lunch, not be free of the cost of it, even if it was from a restaurant.
He laughed and said, "You're kidding, right?"
I didn't. The cost of the food is part of the employee's bill, and the restaurant is probably not getting a discount; it's getting paid for that meal with the employee's money.

La Languedericer, La Languencer or Larenga, de los alzamientos levantinos, era un movimiento revolucionario oligárquico a los que se añadieron otras revoluciones, la última en 1487. Estaban en contra de la usurpación de Jaime II de Inglaterra por los hijos del fallecido Jaime IV de Escocia y, antes, contra los sucesores de los reyes de Escocia, los Stuart. Surgieron alrededor de 1464, cuando las tropas de Escocia llegaron a Inglaterra, ya que la guerra (Wars of Independence) continuó durante más de un siglo.

Historia 

La rebelión del 8 de febrero (Cabaleiro) de 1464 tuvo sus raíces en la guerra civil de Escocia entre los partidarios de Dunaverty contra el hijo del rey Eduardo III, Eduardo de Westminster, y sus partidarios, los más poderosos de Escocia, incluyendo a la familia real escocesa. The Balearic government has agreed to finance the construction of a new power station in the Balearic Islands. The commissioning of the new plant will be in 2020.
The government has agreed to finance a new power station that will supply energy in the Balearic Islands.
The new power station will have a capacity of 600MW and will be located in the municipality of Manacor. It is being set up as part of the agreement between the Balearic government and ENTIQ, the company that will develop the project.
The development of this new plant is a part of the project to improve energy security in the Balearic Islands. The agreement with ENTIQ comes after the Balearic government gave the green light for the project last November.

La maison Louis Barilloux è localisede lungo un altra, lungo la Via Regia di Piedivalle è l’antico castello di Nizza (castiglionese), e in realta è la sede del tribunale regionale della Spezia, oggi in una parte del castello, ma nel 1779 si costruì una nuova casa.

La casa è stata costruita per Louis Barilloux, direttore dell'Ufficio Tipografi Locali (in italiano locale), quando il tribunale fu trasferito qui. La casa ha un portale in pietra sormontate da una merlatura in pietra ed era composto di due torrette che si sovrapposero, forse il rifacimento di un edificio di epoca pre-romana a pianta quadrata, più grande e ben costruito.

Il Castello di Nizza è sede del Tribunale regionale della Spezia, di cui fa parte anche la sezione della Spezia. La sede è in via Regia, nel piano seminterrato del Castello, sul numero 14.

Many new services are required to help children and their families to cope with the stresses and strains of dealing with a serious illness. The services are usually delivered in the home. This involves providing respite care, and ongoing support and therapy to family and child. These services help to alleviate the stress of coping and are often referred to as case management.
Other services may be provided on an outpatient basis, where the child is accompanied by the parents and goes to the provider for the service. This type of service is often provided in a hospital setting, where the child may stay overnight or for some other length of stay. This kind of care may be given in a clinic setting or by a psychiatrist at an outpatient hospital clinic. Many physicians also practice outpatient psychiatry, and some psychiatrists also participate in a hospital's multidisciplinary team.

Le Balaersee 5a de Oeystremerdijkm, également appelé Lac de Balaersee, est un lac artificiel créé au début du  à Oeystremerdijk, ancienne commune de la province de Holanda septentrionale en Hollande-Septentrionale, aux Pays-Bas. Le lac est construit pour les besoins industriels de Pernis. Le lac Balaersee mesure 1,7 km de long pour une largeur comprise entre 0,4 et 0,6 km.

C'est l'un des deux lacs artificiels les plus grands du Pays-Bas (le second étant le Lac de Rotterdam). Contrairement au Lac de Wormerveer, où l'existence d'un canal a été mentionnée dès les années 1350, il est certain que l'eau de Balaersee provient de la réservoir du lac de Kralingen.

Le lac est alimenté par le canal de la Dwarsrivier, par lequel on achemine l'écoulant d'origine de la Ligne de Vl

Kendon Lindsall Coching(May 800. - May 1, 2000) was an African-American jazz saxophonist. He was a founder of the Blue Note Records label, which released his album The Birth of the Cool as one of the first jazz albums in the 'cool jazz' style associated with Miles Davis. His work as a leader was eclipsed in his years with the label by the success of others such as Tony Bennett and Miles Davis, though he was considered by John Coltrane one of the best of the Blue Note-era saxophonists. He was also a member of Woody Herman's band throughout its existence.

Biography 
Kendon Coching was born in San Francisco and attended Lincoln High School there. His father, Edward Lindsall, had been a jazz musician who had worked with Louis Armstrong. He studied on piano and clarinet with a former teacher of Miles Davis, John Blake. Coching joined the San Francisco Symphony Youth Concerto Orchestra at the tender age of thirteen, becoming principal clarinet in 1936

Given an array arr[] of n integers and we define p as the pivot element of arr. Now pivot element is to be placed at the end of the array. If the pivot is present at the begining of the array arr[0] is to be placed at the last position and if pivot is present at the end of the arr[n-1] is to placed at the first position. We also define left and right as left  = pivot – 1 and right = n – 1. We will rotate the array arr[] from its left side and place the last element at the left. We will continue to do till the array elements reach one of the three conditions (arr[right] ≠ pivot, arr[] ≤ pivot or p = arr[left]).

This problem is also considered as a special variant of the problem of Rotting Array in Code War (CW), which is known as  DYNAMIC Programming I.

Input
arr[] = {5,2,3,0,1,

<!-- This class supports using VNC within virtual environment for GUI tasks where one desk and the display is not reachable from within the virtual environment. -->

# Contents
- [Introduction](introduction)
- [Example](example)
- [Requirements](requirements)
- [Running](running)
- [Testing](test)

# Introduction
The vnc server can work inside a virtual environment. In some of the situations where the display is not reachable from within the virtual env or some other physical display on desk is used, and the virtual env has it's own display.
The virtual env can be used as a docker container. But with limitations. For those use cases this container has been made. This container has one additional piece: it creates a virtual display on the container, from which the display can be reached from within the virtual env.

This is not a virtualenv in itself, but it's a wrapper over the virtualenv, that allows controlling the virtualenv display from the host (within the virtual env display). 

# Example
``` shell 
source vnc_wrapper.sh

Evolution, or in another expression Darwid, consists to take advantage when opportunity comes knocking. But even when the chances are lost, there are strategies to regain them. We all know that many times we try and do what is convenient us, or what we think is right, but this is when we fail.
Because in Evolution it is always about the good for the evolution, not what we can have for. But when it comes to the evolution you have to be strategic, be smart and take some risks, but not too much risk, just enough to have possibilities.
For example, if you have some money that you don’t know how it is, and you are planning to spend it, the best would be to go to that shop and check if the discounts are there. They can help with the money you have, but if for the next time, and you go to that shop and see that prices have changed, you can give them the same discount. And that with each one of the times. You see, it’s evolution. Take the right chances.

sed is not needed for this use case since you can build a Bash function and pass the file into the function in a variablte:
#!/bin/bash filepath=$(mktemp "/tmp/xxxx.XXX") exec 3<>$filepath if [[ "$1" ]]; then xmllint --format $1 > $filepath else echo "Usage: $0 [TESTFILE.xml]" exit 1 fi exec 3<&0 sed -r "/<title>/ {/</title>/ p}q" < $filepath
The sed command is written to only parse on the first occurrence of the "title" element. So you can run this script by passing

Happie Hommy: Boss Fucker EP, volumen numero cinco – The Dear Hunter
The fifth EP by Happie Hommy is an EP to start 2011. Boss Fucker sounds like a post apocalyptic album: it’s dark, heavy rock with a lot of electronic touches. This time, the band uses a different sound compared to the previous EPs, the songs here do not reach a certain melody.
With one exception. The title track Boss Fucker is the best song here: it’s a song I know and love since the release of the fourth Ep.
This song is a total success since it combines perfectly what Happie Hommy is about: heavy riffs, dark atmosphere and a very nice melody (that is what catches my attention in this song). This is the only song here that really reaches the quality of the previous four.
The other songs are good too, but nothing that really surprises me. This EP is a good EP, but it’s not much better than the others ones.

In 1986, Lena Likinya was born the third child of the four children in the Likinya household. Lena has five sisters and seven brothers.
Lena Likinya’s father was a primary school teacher who resigned due to a financial issue and took his wife and children to South Africa. Lena’s mother remained behind to continue her work. From the age of ten, Lena Likinya grew up in South Africa helping her mother with the children.
After completing high school, Lena Likinya moved back to Mbeya with her sisters and brothers; the men were already in the city with their wives. There they started doing hairdressing work at a hair factory.

In one oral argument earlier last April 16th the Philippine Supreme Court issued an En Banc ruling granting the motion of the petitioner for certiorari filed against Ombudsman Eusebio Gasgonia. The SC specifically denied the motion of the Ombudsman to dismiss the case filed against him and his office by the petitioner.
The SC is a body which protects the rights of the people and it is in fact mandated by law to protect these rights. So what has the Ombudsman done, which is beyond his powers. What has he done that is of such monumental magnitude that warrants dismissal of the case against him? The right of the court to decide on dismissal cases rests on the power of the court to declare nullities. The rule on the power of the court to order prejudicial dismissal of a case is that there should be serious and clear violation of a constitutional right. There may be circumstances when the Ombudsman may have abused his or her power of appointment and the SC will have to consider the extent or level of power abuse in his appointment since by constitutional definition a position

Björnsen Rorbye Tilsted and Haug Sogner discusses their participation at the exhibition "Sensory and Cognitive Perception: The Eye of the Mind"
The exhibition Sensory and Cognitive Perception: The Eye of the Mind took place at Copenhagen University’s Department of Psychology from 23 April to 10 June 2018. The exhibition featured a wide variety of exhibits on senses, perception, and mental functions related to how our sensory organs translate our outer world into information that our brain can utilize.
Rorbye, Tilsted, Haug Sogner participated in the exhibition by providing information about their work on perception of sound and vision with the help of virtual experiences, and how the latest sensory perception research can contribute to the creation of more engaging visuals for the next generation of video games. The exhibition also featured an installation by Rorbye Tilsted called ‘Hearing Imaginary Wands’. In this installation, Rorbye was able to control an array of 3D printed wands by using a sensor that reacted to sound. The visitor was invited

We started off yesterday morning driving back over Intertangled Ropes on top of the world, then going into the gorgeous, huge glacial valleys of New Zealand. We drove down the west coast to the Franz Josef Glacier and on our way down to Franz Josef we drove through stunning native forests with the glacier as a prominent feature. We were able to glimpse the glacier on our way down so we took the opportunity for a walk up to the glacier when we reached the town. The glaciers are so unique and stunning from both a land form and wildlife perspective. The glacier we hiked to had some stunning ice caves and hanging glaciers.
The drive after Franz Joseph was through the mountains and over a pass. Once over the pass we were able to see Mt Cook in the distance, it’s one of the biggest mountains in New Zealand and the tallest volcano. For another incredible moment we drove over the Haast Pass, which has the highest concentration of waterfalls in New Zealand, as well as having an incredible drive through the mountains. It was truly amazing to drive through the landscape and look down at the waterfalls in

All the windows are modern, the original windows have been replaced, some have been blocked up and some have had modern casements put in. The roofs are a mixture of modern pantiles and leaded tiles. The interior has recently been alterd in a modern style.
The churchyard contains a large number of interesting memorials, most in pebble stones, but also several in marble, slate, granite and tiles. In November we lost Jim Bevis Jr.
As reported last month Jim (aka Mighty Bevis) was diagnosed with cancer at the end of June. I had just returned from a trip to the Pacific Northwest and missed the emails from all of you regarding the news.
I have been unable to send out personal emails or make personal phone calls to many of you. But please know that I read them all and appreciate your words of encouragement.
Please pray for Jim’s family (Dawn, Shannon and the kids) while they grieve the loss of their dad/husband and husband’s best friend. I would tell Jim, and he would look me square in the eye and smile and say “Don’t worry about me”. I think he knew how I felt.

PRELICTIONARY BASE CLAGE is at present no different than preposition or article - the base clade.
The problem with this is that you have a few words in between
- the base clade
- the preposition
- the article
And you're not allowed to separate them by more than one space!
The rules are a bit vague about what constitutes two spaces. If you look at "two weeks " with two spaces before and after, it is accepted.
There are two cases of space:
1) After a noun or a verb
2) After a preposition
If you take for example "the next generation of managers" you would be accepted, but if I take for example the word "on" and if I try to insert it with two spaces before and after, the answer is no.
This is pretty annoying!
I'm posting a new lesson tomorrow to teach you exactly how to separate these words.
Stay tuned!.
Hello,
The answer is: you can insert two spaces, and it is correct because the word after the base is the article "the". The spaces indicate that "managers" is the word

FREDDON PORTRAU (fl . Þn3s). A French monk who flourished in the early Þm300s. He devoted himself to ascetical reading, and was noted for his penance and holiness. The name 'Freddon' is spelled numerous ways throughout the sources, such as Freidun Portrauel, Friderich Portrauel, Freidun Porteual, and Freidun Portraoul. He is the only one of these names to appear with enough certainty to be identified. He is the one who translated an anonymous text called 'The Calls on the Faith of the Monks' from Latin into French, which contains an important list of saints and monks associated with the Benedictine observances ('The Vulgate Life of Saint Benedict and the Fathers of the Monks': V. But now the plant industry must pay for itself as most researchers in Australia fund their research by means of project grants and the need for grant money means that their pay is tied to the amount of grant money they can bring in. This makes them very conservative and their work tends to be directed towards developing plants that are highly profitable (i.e. they perform better). It is in this context that nutritive plants have been neglected.
The nutritive potential of a plant also needs to be considered when it forms a component in foods. It needs to contain some protein, lipid and carbohydrate, to provide a source of energy during growth and throughout life. It needs sufficient mineral, vitamin and other micronutrients to produce healthy adult life and to sustain it. It must also be a source of useful nutritive components such as vitamin C and flavonoids. There must be sufficient of these components to ensure the proper functioning of the body for growth, reproduction and development. Many plants, while nutritious, are nutritionally inferior to some of the more commonly used high protein and high energy vegetable sources.

D. Methaq Qayam ("د. طيعرع مرهق" Mershaq Qayam in the original) is a Jordanian comic book character, first published in 1969 by the magazine Al-Jamahir li-Masanah in Jordan.

Methaq is a comic character of a poor shepherd boy from Karak. Methaq Qayam is also one of the main characters of a series of popular books.

Methaq Qayam was the first Jordanian superhero, and has been reimagined as a supervillain in many other countries, including the United Arab Emirates and Pakistan.

In Jordan, his adventures have been compiled into many collections and books, including his own comic book and a series of books, which have been translated into a number of languages including English.

Characters
Methaq Qayam has a very important role in the life of the people of Karak, and has been featured in many of the city's festivals and parades over the years.

The other two situations are far more common and much easier to get. Let's say a company wants to raise in its first round. But the company already has at least one investor that has participated in an earlier round. In this scenario, I'd always tell the company to have its attorney issue the investment contract to their already involved investor. You never want to have the company try and sell their shares to the investor they currently are working with. That just opens the door to all sorts of lawsuits. Also the new capital that will be issued will make both the investor that just participated and the investor they are selling to have ownership percentages that are less aligned with the new investors.

The first thing you notice about Dardanus is its location.
Just about a mile from the end of the main road in this ancient mountain village, the restaurant has a stupendous view of the valley below.
Further impressive views can be had from its large terrace and restaurant.
Dardanus is a new establishment and they have recently won quite a few awards including one of "Nouvelle cuisine" for the dish of their local goat and one for the best view of all the restaurants in the Tarn region.
They also have a very pleasant terrace where you can listen to live music in the summer.
This is a very good place for lunch and the setting is beautiful.
There are a number of good things to order here like the pate with ginger and the local sausage which is made with fresh chilies so that it is quite spicy and a delicious dish.
And you won't go hungry.
It is not only an excellent place to have lunch but for those who like to party, it is open till late

La Société scientico-industrale aîmennante (SSY) s'est formée le  avec comme nom initial le Comte de la Tour du Pin, la Société pour fonder la manufacture d'ammoniac, pour financer son ampleissement et son installation.

Après le retour du comte au gouvernement, sa femme, Marie-Madeleine La Tour du Pin, parrain, veut lui confier un projet, fondatrice, important pour la future entreprise. Mais à l'époque, il n'y a plus de possibilités pour construire cette manufacture.

L'ammoniac est produit à Aix-en-Provence et à Toulouse depuis la fin des . Les travaux ont lieu au sud-est de la ville, dans un petit hameau à côté de Cannes, la Société Française pour la construction d'un ammoniacium à haute température. La construction démarrera en 1822 et la première machine fonctionnera en mars 1830, à la fin de la seconde phase de travaux. En 1832 sera découvert le gisement de gaz.

### <label.html>

  <label.html> offers a set of utility elements and features that allows
  you to create a range of "simple" forms. These elements aren't intended
  to be used in the same way as other forms, because the labels
  and error messaging aren't built for use within larger apps.
  The primary goal of <label.html> is to make it relatively
  easy for developers to create stand-alone forms or dialogs
  that are easily styled with CSS.

  The primary benefit of the <label.html> elements is that <input>
  elements become more obvious to developers who may want to add a button
  or link to the form. The lack of a visual label means they'd have to
  rely on other methods—like using `type="button"` or `type="submit"`—to
  signify what kind of control they're working with.

Raven Shank <rmi-help_<atsymbolsign>cs.washington.edu> wrote: 
A friend's new website includes a "News" section containing the text "CU-Boulder's Rex Pogorski writes...". When you click the link, you get a window that asks "You have been visiting a restricted site! You have access to this site via password. If you are sure that you have access to this site, click OK, otherwise click CANCEL". The window has the look, feel, and title bar of a password protected site. To click OK is to acknowledge this message as being from a trusted source. To click CANCEL is to attempt to override this decision and see what lies behind the password.
There is a way around this; however, it isn't obvious what the workaround is... You have to close the window in IE to let it return to the browser it came from. This is true for all browsers I've tested (IE, Netscape, Amaya, Lynx, ELinks).

I. Introduction
In 1965, the American Society for Reproductive Biology had to do with a question: why do the female bodybuilder mummichogs (Ameiurus catus), a species of freshwater fish that is very popular in fishing bait, have larger chests and chunks than bodybuilder females from other species, notably their own, the brown trout? At the time, it was unclear. But after the mummichog breeding experiments were halted in 1966, the mummichogs kept producing their own sons. It took a generation for the species to change its sex, but by 1983, the mummichog had reached a state of sexual reproduction that mimicked the state it had been in at the beginning of the experiment, where males had large chest and shoulders and females had more rounded torsos. The last three words may seem familiar enough but I suspect are much deeper – deeper even than the rest of the film. In the movie, it is as if we are left trying to imagine the consequences that are nevertheless already apparent. There are many examples of such effects nowadays: the rise of neuro-pharmacology for the treatment of depression, anxiety, insomnia and psychotic disorders, for example, not to mention the effects of digital technology that surrounds our lives: our cell phones, social media – or indeed just being inside a computer for an extended period of time and the myriad effects thereof. The movie does not delve into these effects, it merely hints at them with the word ‘safety’, which is also mentioned again in the final quote by the film’s narrator, whose role it is to comment and comment on the film and provide the commentary of a historian. The word ‘sanctuary’ on the other hand has a much more specific connotation. I just added it up; if the whole 487,xxx of all types of items sold on ebay is worth a mere 1.88 billion it is a small percentage of the 21 trillion in US goods and services that we all consume... I guess I have the whole issue of "worth" in context here and don't like it one little bit.
I just bought a 10 pack of the Sony 64x128 RGB SCART tvs...and it was cheaper to buy 10 packs than a unit.
I'm not so sure the big money making potential on ebay isn't simply because so many people participate in it and thus it grows and is worth more every year. I'm not sure that's always a good thing for those looking to sell. The ebay model is good and it works...it would seem that with enough demand you could sell anything you wanted to on ebay or other online sites...is that really true? Does the supply side really work like that?
Not to take away from the good that ebay has done. I guess ebay is just the big elephant of the issue.

ANN ARBOR, Mich. – On two of Michigan’s biggest stages as an NCAA Division I program, senior Kyle Nold could hardly have a better season.
He is 6-0 through the spring portion of the Michigan spring schedule, while winning both of his outings in victories over UAA rivals.
He has not lost since Feb. 9, 2014 in the 50th career meeting between the two schools. It was Nold’s third loss in 20 starts, and it ended his 22-match undefeated streak. In fact, the only match Nold had not won since 2010 was a loss to the Wolverine in the 2012 NCAA Round of 16.
Sunday (4/26), it was Nold’s turn to face UAA competition. He posted the highest score of any player in school history to defeat the Lunar Ties team 17.5-9.75, marking the 20th consecutive win for the Wolverines

BROWN BAR SNOBS HALLIBEMBELING TO BERNARD
By PETER ROPER
September 30th 2013
The Daily Telegraph
The Federal Government has abandoned its plans to put a tax on selling mineral exploration licences to foreign interests after a campaign waged by the minerals exploration industry.
The Government had insisted that the $400 million a year from the mining tax revenue be returned to mining companies through a royalty on the gross value of mineral sales.
But on Tuesday, Treasurer Wayne Swan outlined a new plan to give up to 460 mining companies the opportunity to sell their exploration licences over seven years for the same price as the mining tax.
Mr Swan said the plan for the royalties and licences to be auctioned would yield $1.1 billion from the mining industry to government coffers.
The Government has now abandoned its intention to take up to a third of the government’s royalties from mineral sales and put them towards the mining tax and to raise up to $40

When your family or favorite teachers pick firs and elms on their vacations that you gather from woods of your own or from others, why don't you all chip in and see that some of them get grown in a large enough area to be a community project? But, according to the court, the statute in question would be subjected to some doubt and potential "constitutional infirmity" if it were analyzed under strict original intent analysis. The court went on to state that if strict originalist doctrine was extended to the whole of the statute at issue, then a challenge would be available under every portion of the statute. (An interesting side note to this analysis is that the original intent of "no" means "yes" does not appear to be a viable means of interpretation for the statute at issue here either.)
[In this case, the court concluded that there are no original intent standards that do not apply.]. Which is why Google, and many other corporations, use ethnographic research. It's a technique used to capture research with the users, using a mix of techniques like contextual inquiries, observational studies and other research techniques to gain information.
However, this isn't to say that this is all they use. There are tools they use to capture data in the moment, which I will get to later in this post.
Ethnographic Research is, however, not just about gathering data. It's the process to put all the user data in context. It's collecting, analysing and understanding the data and putting all the data into context and into a story that everyone at the table understands and agrees with.

Des épisodes scénarisés sont alors projetés, dont un qui raconte leur rencontre et le début de leur amitié. La séquence suivante montre une classe de sixième élément où des jeunes hommes se disputent et s'insultan un peu, des discussions en direct sont alors relayées par Radio-Canada et les adultes, dont les enseignants en face, sont interrompus par une jeune femme qui demande et obtient l'autorisation

Epiplectena phytanthae , é distribuída pela Itália, Portugal e Espanha.

É uma borboleta neotropical da família Satyridae.

Posição sistemática e taxonomia 
Borboletas de pequeno tamanho, são reconhecidas como membros da ordem Papilionoidea, grupo da borboleta pertencente à sub-família Symphyta, e filogeneticamente são classificadas como monofilética, ou seja, não formam uma superfamília, família ou mesmo clade. Já para a classificação de Papilionopsidae, monofilética, pode ser considerada uma família, e para Neotropicales, bifilética. Epiplectena, é uma das espécies que fazem parte da família neotropicais, e dentro da neotropicales pode ser estima-se que seja a quarta maior.

Distribuição geográfica 
A espécie se distribuído pelo continente ibérico e peninsular, com a excepção do norte da região
Donga Ram Tau (cabo): uma das atlantiques dos EUA, uma península na província de Humboldt, no norte do estado norte-americano de Califórnia.

Annie Aux Âines Différé's Requies de Châtenay (1993), based on a text of the same name written by Pierre Reverdy, combines traditional elements of literary naturalism with the formal qualities of a narrative that operates more as a mélange of poetic description. It is a complex and often unpredictable form, constructed as a series of interrelated images, which unfolds through a series of scenes that represent the progression of a woman's life.

The first section, "Quatre Petites Images," is a montage of fragments and details of a young woman's life: the bedroom, the kitchen, her lover, her mother, her house, her friends, and her neighbors. The second section, "Dans le Pâturage," develops the theme of the first scene by introducing the figure of a young man, and the third section, "Sommeil," contains three more scenes in which the young woman meets her lover. The work closes with the final "Cinq Petites Images," a brief summation of the previous three sections. Aux Âines

What is the difference between ITIL Service Category and Task Definition ?
ITIL service category is part-and-parcel to define how and where to do a service, while an IT service task definition is needed to perform a IT service
What is Service Catalogue?
In order to ensure smooth and effective operations of the service, an organization provides information of services and what services are to be provided.
What is Service Capability?
An organization provides information of services and what services is to be provided. A service capability is the ability to provide a service to its customers

Le Dessioux was founded under Dèsileus in Rauhaut. It was at the head of a family that came from the east, called Paule. Its capital was Pernes, the Dessioux being only the nominal head of this estate, while the actual one, according to the ancient customs of the land, was called the Seigneur des Eplans. Dessioux inherited from the Paule an estate from which he was exempted. This land was near Aubenas and its name was Eplans, where all their descendants were buried. It was not in Eplans that Dessioux was exempt, but from other estates, to which belonged the estates of Cazals and Château Gaillard which were to pay in turn the obligation of the Seigneur des Eplans. On the ruins of Cazals, which was destroyed in the first century of the Christian era, a Roman Villa and a Roman Forum are to be traced. The Villa of Dessioux, an old castle, may be regarded as the original residence of the family.

This article first appeared in the October 1969 Horticulture Department Bulletin.
Innovating the Canning and Storage Procedure — With New Concepts in Food Preservation, The American Housewife
From Horticulture Department Bulletin No. 50
To our knowledge, no one has devised a new concept for the preparation of food in canning. It is the object of this writing to present the concept of a new preparatory procedure which we consider more satisfactory than the traditional one and which we believe will be better received by the housewife, the grocer, and the canning-house personnel. With more and more foods packaged in glass or paper, we feel the necessity for a new approach to the problem has become more critical.

As you may already know, the Australian taxation system is quite unique from all other taxation systems around the world. The Australian taxation system has many features which make it an interesting system to be learnt. This section will be an opportunity for you to understand these features of the Australian taxation system.
Differences between tax returns and tax audits
There are numerous differences between the two. In a situation where an Australian resident submits a tax return, their tax returns will generally be looked upon by a tax auditor, as there are a range of ways in which a tax audit can be implemented. For example they may need to verify your tax return, or maybe they want to take a closer look at your tax deductions. The main difference is the fact that the Australian Government does not usually look at the tax file in the event of an audit for the purposes of determining your eligibility for a tax return, such as a refund. In the event of a tax audit being triggered, the tax file may be requested.
